scope: Design and deploy three end-to-end agentic workflows for Sahel Cafe Group's 8-location F&B operation: order management, inventory tracking, and weekly operations reporting. Each workflow runs automatically on a defined trigger, requires zero manual input once live, and integrates with the client's existing tools. Includes full documentation, 60 days post-launch support, and a handover session.

deliverables.description: Order management workflow — automated order intake, confirmation, and status tracking across all 8 locations
Inventory tracking workflow — real-time stock alerts and automatic reorder triggers
Weekly operations report — auto-generated Monday summary delivered to management
Team training session (2 hours) — how to monitor, adjust, and extend the workflows

assumptions: Client provides access to existing tools, systems, and integrations by project start date. All required credentials are available within the first week of the engagement.
